start.text: Hey it's Detctive Phelps come to talk with the lowly grunts.
start.name: Officer Otto

A1.text: Ehhhh just a crying woman of the night, some snot wooded thugs, and that startled stool driver. Probably a bad bar joke in there.
A1.name: Officer Otto

A2.text: What do I look like; a comedian?
A2.name: Officer Otto
